---
title: "Example Paper"
date: ""
description: "A study of X using Y methods, targeting Journal Z."
author: ""
format: html
# Status: draft | submitted | under-review | revision | accepted | published
categories: [draft]
listing:
  id: versions
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
    - "!index.qmd"
  type: table
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, date, description, categories]
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

Brief narrative: what question this paper addresses, current status, target venue,
and any relevant notes.

## Versions

::: {#versions}
:::
